clusters.justification: These terms map onto widespread limbic and salience network co-activations, reflecting the overarching macroscopic domain of emotional appraisal, mood regulation, and valence.
Anchored by shared co-activations in frontostriatal and ventromedial prefrontal pathways, these terms converge on the macro-level computation of subjective worth to drive goal-directed behavior.

Tethered to the Default Mode Network (e.g., mPFC, PCC, TPJ), these terms represent the internally-directed, generative modeling of subjective identities, interpersonal dynamics, and self-other representations.
